scenario.title: The Integration Tester
scenario.context: You need to test a feature that spans multiple components and external services. You need AI to help design integration tests with proper mocking and test data.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that guides AI to generate integration tests with appropriate mocking strategies and realistic test scenarios.
constraints: Test component interactions, not just units
scenario.exampleInput: Test the checkout flow: user adds item → applies coupon → enters payment → order created. Involves: CartService, CouponService, StripeAPI, OrderRepository. Need to test happy path and failures at each step.
hints: Identify what to mock vs test real
Design failure scenarios at each integration point

scoringGuide.excellent: Full interaction diagram with data flow
Clear mock vs real decisions with reasoning
